attacking_style: Targets early breakaways with strategic KOM point accumulation rather than stage victory as primary objective. Crests climbs first systematically without full exhaustion.
team_tactics: Operates with autonomy in breakaways to pursue classification jerseys rather than stage wins, suggesting team strategy prioritizes alternative objectives over outright victories.
terrain_preference: Multi-climb stages with categorized ascents where KOM points are available. Thrives in breakaways on rolling terrain with repeated climbing opportunities.
vulnerability: Lacks final explosive power to convert breakaway presence into stage wins. Prioritizes jersey hunting over victory suggests limitations in pure finishing ability.
key_patterns: Systematically targets KOM jersey through disciplined breakaway riding and climb-first tactics.
Conserves energy by not contesting stage wins, focusing instead on classification points accumulation.
Demonstrates tactical intelligence in secondary objective pursuit over high-risk victory attempts.
form_trajectory: unknown: single race observation insufficient to assess form development or trajectory
